summary: TikTok Viral Predictor feature fully tested. All 14 backend tests pass (100%). Frontend UI verified with dark theme, prediction cards, upgrade overlay for unauthenticated users, and full 12 predictions for authenticated users. GPT-5.2 integration is LIVE (not mocked).
seed_data_creation: None - predictions generated via GPT-5.2 from existing product database
context_for_next_testing_agent: TikTok Viral Predictor feature fully tested. Public endpoint GET /api/public/viral-predictions returns 3 predictions (teaser) with upgrade_cta. Premium endpoint GET /api/viral-predictions requires auth and returns all 12 predictions. POST /api/viral-predictions/refresh generates fresh predictions using GPT-5.2 (~15-30 seconds). GET /api/viral-predictions/history returns prediction batches. Frontend at /tiktok-viral has dark theme (bg-[#09090b]), shows prediction cards with rank, viral score, urgency badge, TikTok format, hook idea, hashtags. Upgrade overlay shown for unauthenticated users. Nav link 'TikTok Viral' added to LandingLayout.

test_results.GET /api/public/viral-predictions: PASS - Returns 3 predictions with upgrade_cta, total_available >= 3
test_results.GET /api/public/viral-predictions struct: PASS - Each prediction has viral_score, confidence, urgency, reasoning, tiktok_format, hook_idea, hashtags
test_results.GET /api/viral-predictions (with auth): PASS - Returns all 12 predictions with full details
test_results.GET /api/viral-predictions full details: PASS - Premium predictions have target_demographic, estimated_views, ad_budget_suggestion
test_results.POST /api/viral-predictions/refresh (wit: PASS - Generates fresh predictions using GPT-5.2
test_results.GET /api/viral-predictions/history (with: PASS - Returns prediction batches with generated_at and predictions

ui_tests.TikTok Viral Page Load: PASS - Dark theme (bg-[#09090b]), 'Products about to go viral on TikTok' heading
ui_tests.Prediction Cards (Public): PASS - 3 prediction cards shown for unauthenticated users
ui_tests.Prediction Cards (Authenticated): PASS - 12 prediction cards shown for authenticated users
ui_tests.Prediction Card Structure: PASS - Each card has rank, product name, category badge, viral score, urgency badge, confidence, TikTok format, hook idea, hashtags, audience, budget
ui_tests.Viral Score Display: PASS - Scores displayed with color coding (red for high, amber for medium)
ui_tests.Upgrade Overlay (Public): PASS - Shows '9 more predictions' with 'Unlock All Predictions' CTA
ui_tests.Refresh Button: PASS - Visible for authenticated users next to timestamp
ui_tests.Navigation Link: PASS - 'TikTok Viral' link in main navigation
ui_tests.Landing Page Regression: PASS - Landing page loads correctly with all navigation links

features_verified: Public Teaser (3 predictions) - No auth required
Premium Full Feed (12 predictions) - Auth required
Refresh Predictions - Generates new predictions via GPT-5.2
Prediction History - View previous prediction batches
Urgency Levels (high/medium/low) - Time window for action
TikTok Format Suggestions - Best format for each product
Ad Budget Suggestions - Recommended test budget in GBP

mocked_apis.AI/LLM: LIVE - Uses GPT-5.2 via Emergent LLM Key for prediction generation
mocked_apis.Product Data: LIVE - Predictions based on real products in MongoDB database

notes: Refresh endpoint takes ~15-30 seconds due to GPT-5.2 API call. Public endpoint returns cached predictions if available, generates fresh if none exist. Predictions are stored in MongoDB viral_predictions collection. CSRF middleware requires Bearer-only auth for POST requests (no cookies) to avoid CSRF validation.
